observation_units: campaigns (n=6 per arm) and review labels (n=12 per arm)
note: Posterior summaries are computed from observed review-weighted outcomes. No prior is mixed in — this is a frequentist summary over the trial evidence, consistent with Phase 9B methodology.
uncertainty_note: n=6 per arm is a small sample. All four deltas are positive, providing directional confidence. The approval rate delta (+16.7pp) is the strongest signal and the least likely to be reversed by additional data. Score delta (+0.022) is meaningful but the champion arm had higher score variance, so a larger sample could narrow this gap.
conclusion: PROMOTION_RECOMMENDED with moderate confidence. The signal is consistent across all four metrics and in the predicted direction. The single-surface intervention (evidence_ranking_weights only) cleanly isolates the causal mechanism.
